<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>爸爸为微达制作的太阳公公气球很受欢迎，

<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>The sun balloon Papa made me is really
popular, so I made friends with everyone
in town right away.
It's just like Mama and Papa said.

though we're far apart.
I just remember that when I'm feeling sad.
I'm really glad I came!
